name: Lightweight Story Reader
description: A lightweight, high-performance story platform with secure auth, role-based admin controls, operations center, comic platform with semantic search, VIP content gating, serverless webhooks, and R2 asset proxy.
majorCapabilities: VIP content protection with role-based access
Realtime chapter updates via Supabase Realtime
Cloudflare R2 integration for asset storage

supabase.rls: Row-level security policies for stories and chapters

cloudflare.r2: Asset storage and proxy with JWT-based access control
cloudflare.workers: R2 asset gateway with role-based gating

frontend.auth: Supabase auth with role-based UI components
